rationale.oversight-explanation: Evaluates explanation structures supporting human judgment of AI-generated analyses.
rationale.non-developer: Marketing and sales professionals lacked programming and data-science expertise.
rationale.agentic: AI generated and executed complete analyses delivered for review.
rationale.risk-quality: Empirically studies critical analytical flaws causing unsound decisions.
rationale.method-self-report: Questionnaires collected participants’ critiques and qualitative feedback.
rationale.method-experiment: Controlled tasks manipulated explanation formatting and presented alternatives.
